mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar, u.password, u.sex, u.create_time, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort from user u left join user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id
mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar, u.password, u.sex, u.create_time, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort from user u left join user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.user_name = #{userName}

select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar, u.password, u.sex, u.create_time, u.balance, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort from user u left join user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user( user_id, user_name, nick_name, avatar, sex, password, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{avatar}, #{sex}, #{password}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update user set avatar = #{avatar} where user_name = #{userName}
update user set password = #{password} where user_name = #{userName}
mapper.delete:
delete from user where user_id in
#{userId}
